lessons.title: Why Research Ethics Matters
lessons.description: Respect, harm reduction, and why ethics is part of study quality

lessons.title: Ethics Review and Oversight
lessons.description: IRBs, RECs, protocol review, amendments, and continuing oversight

lessons.title: Consent, Assent, and Voluntariness
lessons.description: Practical consent issues in real-world public health research

lessons.title: Privacy, Confidentiality, and Data Governance
lessons.description: Responsible handling of sensitive data and secondary use

lessons.title: Justice, Equity, and Community Engagement
lessons.description: Fairness in participation, burden, benefit, and partnership

lessons.title: Ethics in Global Health Partnerships
lessons.description: Power, authorship, benefit sharing, and avoiding extractive research

lessons.title: Emergency and Outbreak Research Ethics
lessons.description: Urgency, altered risk-benefit balances, and adaptive oversight

lessons.title: Publication Ethics and Responsible Reporting
lessons.description: Authorship, transparency, conflicts of interest, and research integrity
